label: MAVLink AI - 22 Advisory Safety Monitor
info: Advisory-only safety monitor for heartbeat age, battery, GPS, and altitude. It emits state transitions to normal/warning/critical outputs and never sends a MAVLink command. Tune the constants in Evaluate safety policy for the vehicle and operation.

name: Advisory only: tune thresholds and retain pilot/autopilot failsafes
info: This example intentionally has no MAVLink AI Out node. It is not a replacement for flight-controller battery, geofence, RC-loss, or EKF failsafes.

name: Evaluate safety policy
